answer:
Otter.ai offers an official, provider-hosted Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that enables AI assistants to access, search, and summarize your meeting transcripts [1][2][3].

To connect, add the following endpoint to any MCP-compatible client like Claude, Cursor, or VS Code [2][3]:

`https://mcp.otter.ai/mcp`

The server utilizes OAuth for secure authentication [2][3]. Upon the first connection, your client will prompt you to authorize access; subsequent sessions reuse these credentials [2][3]. This setup provides tools for listing meetings, retrieving full transcripts, and fetching AI-generated summaries and action items [3][4]. Note that this feature is typically available on Otter Business or Enterprise plans [3].
